title: Simple Ore Miner
description: A simple Minecraft mod to mine entire ore veins
body: # [Simple Ore Miner](https://github.com/Jan-Marvin/simple-ore-miner) A simple Minecraft mod to mine entire ore veins. Works on all vanilla ores and their deepslate variants, as well as nether quartz, nether gold, and ancient debris. ## Controls: ``` Toggle ON/OFF: Sneak + Right-Click (while a pickaxe is in the main hand) ```
